commands_executed: rpm -q pam && echo "pam package is installed" || echo "pam package not found"
echo "Checking pam_wheel configuration" && grep -n "pam_wheel" /etc/pam.d/su 2>/dev/null || echo "pam_wheel not found in su configuration"

echo "Attempting remediation" && rpm -q pam > /dev/null && sed -i 's/^[[:space:]]*#[[:space:]]*auth[[:space:]]\\+required[[:space:]]\\+pam_wheel\\.so[[:space:]]\\+use_uid$/auth required pam_wheel.so use_uid/' /etc/pam.d/su 2>/dev/null && echo "Remediation attempted" || echo "Remediation failed"

echo "Remediation attempt" && grep -q "pam_wheel" /etc/pam.d/su 2>/dev/null && echo "pam_wheel found" || echo "pam_wheel not found"
